name: quiz-game
description: Quiz Game - система управления интеллектуальными играми

scripts.dev:services: docker-compose --profile dev up -d && echo 'Services started! PgAdmin: http://localhost:8080, Redis Commander: http://localhost:8081'
scripts.dev:restart: npm run dev:stop && npm run dev:services
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:backend && npm run lint:fix:frontend
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:backend && npm run type-check:frontend
scripts.validate: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:backend && npm run format:check:frontend
scripts.db:reset: docker-compose down -v postgres && docker-compose up -d postgres
scripts.db:backup: docker-compose exec postgres pg_dump -U quiz_user -d quiz_game_dev > backups/backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.prod:restart: npm run prod:stop && npm run prod:start
scripts.health:check: npm run health:postgres && npm run health:redis
scripts.health:postgres: docker-compose exec postgres pg_isready -U quiz_user -d quiz_game_dev
scripts.clean:install: npm run clean:modules && npm run install:all
scripts.clean:modules: rm -rf node_modules quiz-game-backend/node_modules quiz-game-frontend/node_modules package-lock.json quiz-game-backend/package-lock.json quiz-game-frontend/package-lock.json
scripts.clean: npm run clean:build && npm run services:clean
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run services:start && echo 'Setup complete! Run npm run dev to start development'
scripts.start: npm run services:start && npm run dev
scripts.release: npm run validate && npm run test && npm run build

author: Quiz Game Team
